arts.ttl: Arne Slot reacts to Virgil van Dijk contract hint as Darwin Nunez Liverpool absence explained
arts.sum: Reaction from Arne Slot as the Liverpool boss reflects on Virgil van Dijk's contract hint and Darwin Nunez's absence is explained

arts.ttl: Jamie Carragher drops telling Virgil van Dijk hint after Mo Salah's new Liverpool contract
arts.sum: Jamie Carragher believes Liverpool are planning for an announcement about Virgil van Dijk's future in the coming week after Mohamed Salah signed a new contract, saying he believes the Dutchman "didn't want to steal his thunder"

arts.ttl: How Liverpool mixed it up to take step closer to title
arts.sum: Match of the Day 2 pundits Danny Murphy and Dion Dublin admire how Liverpool have mixed up their attacking approach this season, including in the 2-1 win against West Ham.

arts.ttl: Roy Keane aims cheeky jibe at Virgil van Dijk as Liverpool VAR question raised
arts.sum: Virgil van Dijk was scorer of Liverpool's late winner against West Ham United and Roy Keane has had his say

arts.ttl: Arne Slot makes feelings crystal clear on Liverpool situation: 'I don't care'
arts.sum: Liverpool beat West Ham United 2-1 at Anfield on Sunday afternoon to extend their lead at the top of the table and put Arne Slot closer to the title in his debut season at Anfield

arts.ttl: Real Madrid have ‘analysed’ transfer swoop for Liverpool star

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reacts to new Virgil van Dijk contract comment
arts.sum: Arne Slot's press conference inevitably focused on Virgil van Dijk after his dramatic winner for Liverpool against West Ham.

arts.ttl: ‘I think’: David Ornstein names six Liverpool players with uncertain futures under Arne Slot this summer

arts.ttl: Arne Slot reaches impressive milestone as Liverpool close in on title with late West Ham win
arts.sum: Liverpool left it late to secure a 2-1 win over West Ham at Anfield on Sunday thanks a late goal from Virgil van Dijk after Andy Robertson's own goal cancelled out Luis Diaz's opener
